# tags / filter

The **tags** (multi-value) type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "tags", ... })` ‚Äî a multi-select
chip `Control` (one `ToggleChip` per `field.options` entry, toggling membership
of a `selected: string[]`) plus the pure, **array-aware** `predicate` /
`isActive` applied in the data-view row pipeline. With no selection the filter
is inactive and keeps every row; otherwise a row matches when its tag set
intersects the selected set (match-any via `.some`).
